title: lasianthus saxorum
intro: Lasianthus saxorum, also known as rock lasianthus or rock lasiandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is native to mountainous regions in China and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent. The plant's leaves and stems have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, with the health benefits including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The herbal preparation of Lasianthus saxorum typically involves drying and processing the plant's leaves and stems into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
